zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Luttrell於1208年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾胡頓 帕格爾時，他的父親Geoffrey Luttrell50歲，母親Frethesant de Paynell39歲。他與Pernel Mare結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1264年在英國薩默塞特易亞斯特 全藍托潔黑阿德享年56歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特易亞斯特 全藍托潔黑阿德。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Luttrell was born in 1208, in Hooton Pagnell, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey Luttrell, was 50 and his mother, Frethesant de Paynell, was 39. He married Pernel Mare. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1264, in East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Luttrell est né en 1208, à Hooton Pagnell, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey Luttrell, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Frethesant de Paynell, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Pernel Mare. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1264, à East Quantoxhead, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à East Quantoxhead, Somerset, Angleterre.

Er hat Pernel Mare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1264 im Alter von 56 Jahren in East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England und wurde in East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Luttrellが1208年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホーオトン プアグネルで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Luttrellは50歳，母Frethesant de Paynellは39歳であった。Pernel Mareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1264年にイギリスソメルセトエアスト クアントクスヘドで56歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトエアスト クアントクスヘドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Luttrell(이)가 1208년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 후턴 파그넬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Luttrell(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Frethesant de Paynell(은)는 39세였다. 그는 Pernel Mare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년 영국 서머세트 이스트 퀄토스헤드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 이스트 퀄토스헤드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Luttrell родился в 1208 г. в местности хутон пагнелл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey Luttrell было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Frethesant de Paynell, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Pernel Mare. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1264 г. в местности эаст куантоксхид, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст куантоксхид, сомирсет, Англия.
